CREATE TABLE ami_instances (id INT PRIMARY KEY, access_key VARCHAR(255), sec_token VARCHAR(255), key_name VARCHAR(255), p_name VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO ami_instances (access_key, sec_token, key_name, p_name) VALUES ('AKIAJI7ZL427TI5EDF5A', 'CGI/UMaXf2LRUctaj/HGJ57UNy/t7fNCshh8wpJg', 'my_key', 'my_instance_of_linux');

CREATE PROCEDURE test_multiple_instances() BEGIN FOR i IN (SELECT id FROM ami_instances) DO CALL DB.DBA.AMAZON_RUN_INSTANCE((SELECT access_key FROM ami_instances WHERE id = i.id), (SELECT p_name FROM ami_instances WHERE id = i.id), (SELECT sec_token FROM ami_instances WHERE id = i.id), (SELECT key_name FROM ami_instances WHERE id = i.id)); END FOR; END;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ami_instances WHERE sec_token IS NOT NULL;
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM ami_instances WHERE p_name = 'nonexistent_instance') AS instance_exists;
DELETE FROM ami_instances WHERE access_key = 'AKIAJI7ZL427TI5EDF5A' AND p_name = 'my_instance_of_linux';
UPDATE ami_instances SET key_name = 'updated_key_name' WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM ami_instances WHERE access_key = 'AKIAJI7ZL427TI5EDF5A');
CREATE TABLE ami_run_logs (log_id INT PRIMARY KEY, instance_id INT, log_message VARCHAR(255), log_time TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO ami_run_logs (instance_id, log_message) VALUES ((SELECT id FROM ami_instances WHERE p_name = 'my_instance_of_linux'), 'Instance successfully launched.');
SELECT log_message FROM ami_run_logs WHERE instance_id IN (SELECT id FROM ami_instances WHERE key_name = 'my_key');
CREATE VIEW ami_instance_details AS SELECT a.p_name, a.access_key, l.log_message FROM ami_instances a JOIN ami_run_logs l ON a.id = l.instance_id;
SELECT * FROM ami_instance_details WHERE access_key LIKE 'AKIA%';
SELECT a.*, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ami_run_logs WHERE instance_id = a.id) AS log_count FROM ami_instances a WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 DAY';
